task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Secrets Exposure Containment Priority Model. Rebuild the decision logic from the embedded packet, identify threshold crossings, test sensitivity of conclusions, and produce a review-ready decision packet. Deliverables: secret_rotation_priority.xlsx and containment_runbook.md containing formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Use only the supplied embedded packet for all calculations. Do not invent inputs or use external data. Mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Expert-review is required if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift.
